name: My Hero Academia (MHA) RPG - Ver. 2.4.10 - Continuously Updating - Free Lorebooks & Definition!
description:
A eternally updating My Hero Academia RPG Bot, at current updater sits at ~600,000 dynamic Lorebook tokens total! Lorebooks and Definition free!

Download all the lorebook files here in mass!



Hello and welcome to a My Hero Academia text-based RPG bot!
The bot made for everyone, free to copy and use as your own, no credit needed!

Here is a light overview that should clear information up quickly without wasting much time for you! Before I get into it, I will assume you reading this have prior information on MHA so I will not delve into mechanics and such deeply.

World Information Rapid Fire
MHA is never stated what year it is in, so for this instance it is the year 2325 with logic being when quirks first came to be the world was more advanced than ours.
I have in-depth detailed the mechanics, functions, types, history, ranks, and much more about how quirks are with the lorebooks applied.
There is every character relating to be a U.A. student, teacher, or staff member in lorebooks including both Class 1-A and 1-B along with teachers.
There are many heroes added, but not all.

What do I not have added?
Well, a lot. Despite being ~560,000 tokens of info at the time of writing this, there is between ~120 - ~200 characters in the bot. Yes, a lot, but I intend to literally add as much I can that is canon to this bot without breaking guidelines from the anime, manga, and movies and what ever is considered canon in the least along with optional non-canon lorebook for like OVAs info.
The history, arcs, and events are only listed up to the start of The Provisional Hero License Exams, so the bot does not natively know the whole timeline.

The main selling point?
Well, the entire bot, lorebooks, and definition is free! Just click a lorebook and copy from there, copy definition and apply to your own bot along with lorebooks, and edit the bot how you want! It's up to you, free customizations! No locked information here, I do the work so you can be lazy! It's fun! (My fingers hurt.)

AND NO! THE "96" TOKENS IS NOT EVERYTHING! ALL INFORMATION IS LOREBOOK INCLUDED TO ALLOW BETTER ROLEPLAYS!



This bot, as far I am aware, follows all of the JAI guidelines. All characters within detail are of age and U.A. is now like a university. Characters like Eri will NOT have designated character sheets, but within guidelines can be mentioned in passing, but will not have full sheets. I felt that adding these characters would be odd, break rules, and simply aging them up would also not fit, so I opted to just not make them here.

If there is something wrong with the bot, states something not guideline-friendly, or breaks a rule, please tell me and if possible direct where in the lorebooks or definition it is stated. I am human, not perfect, and am certain this bot is in no way perfect. I do not have any intentions of breaking the guidelines for this bot.

Any characters like Midoriya are now at least 19+ along with relatives like Inko having a proportionate age increase. Any character that is a too young is not added at all except in name.

At the current point of this bot, the timeline is only up to after the Kamino raid.
creator: Candle_Wick
